source: Session work items — create tickets then split into stacked PRs. Run: LINEAR_API_KEY=xxx node scripts/linear/create-issues.mjs --input docs/backlog/session-tickets.json --team-key ANM

tickets.title: [X Platform] Fix CI: add .nvmrc and correct go-version-file path
tickets.description:
## Summary
CI failed: .nvmrc did not exist (untracked), go-version-file pointed to wrong path.

## Changes
- Add .nvmrc (20.19.0)
- Fix go-version-file: omnichannel/backend/go.mod → services/omnichannel/backend/go.mod in ci.yml and deploy-preflight.yml

## PR
Stack PR 1 — base

tickets.title: [X Platform] Add Greptile MCP for Cursor, Claude, Codex
tickets.description:
## Summary
Configure Greptile MCP for code search/analysis across Cursor, Claude Code, and Codex.

## Changes
- .mcp.json (Claude Code)
- .codex/config.toml (Codex)
- docs/runbooks/greptile-mcp-setup.md
- docs/runbooks/cursor-cloud-parity.md (Greptile + LINEAR_API_KEY)
- .cursor/mcp.json (user adds manually)

## PR
Stack PR 2

tickets.title: [X Platform] Linear ticket creation with parent/child linking and PR linkage
tickets.description:
## Summary
Extend create-issues.mjs for parentRef, add link-pr-to-linear.sh, runbooks, ticket payloads.

## Changes
- scripts/linear/create-issues.mjs (parentRef support)
- scripts/linear/link-pr-to-linear.sh
- scripts/linear/README.md
- docs/runbooks/linear-pr-linkage.md
- docs/backlog/*.json payloads
- scripts/create-prs-for-branches.sh (use PR template)

## PR
Stack PR 2

tickets.title: [X Platform] Concise PR template and tech debt removal
tickets.description:
## Summary
Replace verbose PR template; remove .pr-body-devex.md, __pycache__, connectrpc-sdk-nx-ticket.json; add Python to .gitignore.

## Changes
- .github/PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE.md
- Remove .pr-body-devex.md
- .gitignore (__pycache__, *.pyc)
- Remove docs/backlog/connectrpc-sdk-nx-ticket.json

## PR
Stack PR 2

tickets.title: [X Platform] AGENTS.md: Ralph loop, Linear CLI fallback, mistake logging
tickets.description:
## Summary
Add Ralph loop friendly section, Linear CLI fallback when MCP unavailable, strengthen mistake logging with how-to-avoid and what-to-do-instead.

## Changes
- AGENTS.md
- docs/agent-mistakes.md (template + new entries)
- docs/runbooks/cursor-cloud-parity.md (LINEAR_API_KEY)

## PR
Stack PR 3

tickets.title: [X Platform] Migrate verify_apps to Nx targets
tickets.description:
## Summary
Replace scripts/verify apps shell logic with nx run-many -t build. CI apps job runs nx directly.

## Changes
- scripts/verify (verify_apps uses nx run-many)
- .github/workflows/ci.yml (apps job: npm ci + nx run-many)

## PR
Stack PR 4

tickets.title: [X Platform] Ticket payloads: folder-by-feature, local workflow, verify-nx
tickets.description:
## Summary
Backlog payloads for future work.

## Changes
- docs/backlog/folder-by-feature-tickets.json
- docs/backlog/local-github-workflow-tickets.json
- docs/backlog/verify-nx-targets-tickets.json

## PR
Stack PR 2
